issue.body:

AdGuard Base filter

AdGuard URL Tracking filter

AdGuard Russian filter Tracking protection: | enabled DNS filtering: | server: `https://dns.google/dns-query`
filters: `https://filters.adtidy.org/android/filters/15_optimized.txt` Browsing Security: | disabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | disabled Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=and&product_version=3.6.11+%2854%29&system_version=&browser=chrome&filters=23.3.11.4.14.1.2.17&dns.servers=https%3A%2F%2Fdns.google%2Fdns-query&android.mode=VPN&android.system_root=false&dns.filters=https%253A%252F%252Ffilters.adtidy.org%252Fandroid%252Ffilters%252F15_optimized.txt&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&https.filtering=true&browsing_security.enabled=false&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.hide_search_queries=false&stealth.DNT=false&stealth.x_client=false&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&license_type=paid&dns.timeout=5000)

### Issue URL (Ads) [NSFW] [https://rt.pornhub.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Frt.pornhub.com%2F) ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/mnnt29cuc0gcsk0cs8o4kkk040wg4owa7n7wrrb9go.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Mac v2.18.0.2089 release System version: | `MacOS 26.5.1 (Выпуск 25F80)` Browser: | yandex Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
AdGuard URL Tracking filter,
EasyPrivacy

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter

**Security:**
Online Malicious URL Blocklist,
Phishing URL Blocklist,
Scam Blocklist by DurableNapkin,
uBlock Origin – Badware risks

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Russian filter Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Hide your search queries,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Browser API**:
Block Java

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | enabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=mac&product_version=2.18.0.2089+release&system_version=MacOS+26.5.1+%28%D0%92%D1%8B%D0%BF%D1%83%D1%81%D0%BA+25F80%29&browser=yandex&filters=1.2.3.17.18.19.21.118.208.255.256.257&dns.servers=System&userscripts=AdGuard%2520Extra%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.user.js%29&dns.filters=&dns.filters_enabled=false&dns.enabled=false&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=true&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.java=true&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.referrer=&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&referrer=&scheme_version=3&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=2000)
